noAccess.title: No admin access
noAccess.desc: Your account has no admin permission (needs one of org:write / user:write / audit:read).
noAccess.noOrgDesc: The admin console manages organizations, members and audit. You don't have any organization yet — create one in the workspace to unlock it.

overview.welcomeDesc: Manage your company's organizations, members, audit and compliance.
overview.audit: Audit log (IP / actor / changes / parent chain)

users.title: User directory
users.hint: Search users in this company (invisible users are excluded)
